ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_number" TEXT /* Course number (e.g., GLG102 and GLG104) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course (e.g., Introduction to Geology II - Historical Lecture and Lab) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the course (e.g., H, L, FYC, MA, SB) */,
  "credits" REAL /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic department offering the course */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  "is_gateway" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the course is a gateway course */,
  "min_credit_range" REAL /* Minimum credit range for the course */,
  "max_credit_range" REAL /* Maximum credit range for the course */,
  "semester_offered" TEXT /* Semesters in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content and objectives */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., single, combination, or none) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prereq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prereq_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prereq_grade" TEXT /* Minimum grade required to meet the prerequisite */,
  "prereq_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the prerequisite */,
  "prereq_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., single, combination, or none) */,
  "prereq_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the prerequisite, such as special conditions or exceptions */,
  "corequisite_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the course is a corequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prereq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prereq_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereq_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or special requirement */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., general, special requirement, warning) */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added or last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_notes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_combinations" (
  "combo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course combination */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is part of the combination */,
  "combo_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is combined with the main course */,
  "combo_details" TEXT /* Details about the combination */,
  "combo_type" TEXT /* Type of combination (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "combo_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the combination, such as special conditions or exceptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_combinations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_combinations_combo_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("combo_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., H, L, FYC, MA, SB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent area (for hierarchical areas) */,
  "area_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_parent_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic department associated with the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (student) enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor of the course */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Section number of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view course) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., login, view course, enroll) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
